case h.e'_2
ι : Type u_1

inst✝³ : AddCommGroup V
inst✝² : Module k V
inst✝¹ : AddTorsor V P
p : ι → P
s : Finset ι
inst✝ : Nontrivial k
w : { x // x ∈ ↑s } → k
hw : ∑ i, w i = 1
hp : (Finset.affineCombination k Finset.univ (p ∘ Subtype.val)) w ∈ affineSpan k (Set.range (p ∘ Subtype.val))
⊢ ∑ x ∈ {x ∈ s | x ∈ s}.attach, w ⟨↑x, ⋯⟩ = ∑ i, w i

failed_attempts: simpa using (Finset.sum_attach (s := s) (f := fun x => w x))

      sorry

simpa using (Finset.sum_attach (s := s) (f := fun x : {x // x ∈ (↑s : Set ι)} ↦ w x)).symm
    sorry

simp

simpa [Finset.filter_true_of_mem] using (Finset.sum_attach (s := s) fun i => w i)

simp
